pr.title: Record: Aggressive SGD TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1124)

output.summary: Base 11L model uses score-first SGD TTT on validation with aggressive LR and epochs plus full unfreeze to amplify adaptation gains.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT explicitly fine-tunes on the validation shard via SGD after base training, so the submission trains on validation-only data.
techniques: Score-first SGD TTT with LR ≈1.0 and 30 epochs
Unfreeze every block during TTT so high LR converges
Int6+zstd quantization followed by sliding-window evaluation
